scripts.build: npm run build --workspace packages/contracts && npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,blue "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client"
scripts.update:start: git pull && npm run build && npm run db:migrate && npm run start --workspace server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace packages/contracts && npm run build --workspace packages/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace server && npm run typecheck --workspace client
